note: Sample-only expression feature engineering; failures usually come from log2 transforms, ratio denominators, or rounding.
Complete-chain matched expression and weighted VAF per call; models must map gene-specific expression and keep only matched calls.
Condition/gene statistical summary; hard parts are complete-chain filtering, expression mapping, median, and population standard deviation.
Stress-vs-control log2 marker deltas; failures tend to average before transforming or group high_light/drought incorrectly.
Non-reference pathway/tissue burden score; models must combine complete-chain filtering, VAF, log2 expression, and grouped summation.
Sample-level expression z-scores; models must use population standard deviation and sort by the derived mean score.
Condition-level integrative summary; the coefficient of variation and mean VAF require correct complete-chain fact-row weighting.
Sample-level photosynthesis burden table; failures usually involve preserving zero-call samples and applying the high/moderate pressure formula.
